Appearances:
Plaintiff Parkmerced Investors Properties is present. Represented by Donna Stern.
Attorney David Wasserman for the plaintiff.
Defendant Sefa Korkmaz is present. Defendant Baris Parlak is NOT present.
Attorney Richard Shupack appearing for defendant in limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Nils Rosenquest, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions. This case did NOT settle. The trial date of April 6, 2015 remains on calendar.
